nasb.text: Then he stood before the altar of the Lord in the presence of all the assembly of Israel and spread out his hands.

esv.text: Then Solomon stood before the altar of the Lord in the presence of all the assembly of Israel and spread out his hands.

cnv.text: 所羅門在以色列全體會眾面前，站在耶和華的祭壇前，張開雙手；

ccb.text: 所罗门当着以色列会众的面，站在耶和华的坛前，向天伸出双手祷告。
